reasoning: The control 'A.5.13 - Labelling Of Information' pertains to the tagging and labeling of information resources for management and compliance purposes. In Kubernetes, there is no direct equivalent for enforcing labeling policies similar to cloud providers' tagging mechanisms for resources like snapshots, backups, or volumes. Kubernetes does support labeling of resources (e.g., Pods, Nodes) for organizational and operational purposes, but it does not provide built-in mechanisms to enforce or automate labeling policies in the same way cloud providers do for their managed services.
title: Labelling Of Information
